name: marque
description: A Pulumi provider for Marque — atproto-native domain registrar and DNS host.

appPassword.description: atproto app password. Generate one in your account's app-passwords settings.

identifier.description: atproto handle or DID whose PDS holds the DNS records.

service.description: atproto service URL used for authentication (default https://bsky.social).

name.description: Record name relative to the zone apex. Use '@' for the apex itself.

priority.description: Priority for MX and SRV records.

type.description: DNS record type. One of A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, SRV, NS, CAA.

appPassword.description: atproto app password. Generate one in your account's app-passwords settings.

identifier.description: atproto handle or DID whose PDS holds the DNS records.

service.description: atproto service URL used for authentication (default https://bsky.social).

appPassword.description: atproto app password. Generate one in your account's app-passwords settings.

identifier.description: atproto handle or DID whose PDS holds the DNS records.

service.description: atproto service URL used for authentication (default https://bsky.social).

marque:index:DnsZone.description: A Marque DNS zone (at.marque.dns record) — the full DNS record set for a domain.

domain.description: Fully qualified domain name this zone belongs to. Must be a domain already registered in the account's at.marque.domain records. Changing this replaces the zone.

records.description: Full set of DNS records for the zone. Marque stores the whole zone as one atproto record, so writes are atomic and this list is authoritative — omitted entries are removed.

domain.description: Fully qualified domain name this zone belongs to. Must be a domain already registered in the account's at.marque.domain records. Changing this replaces the zone.

records.description: Full set of DNS records for the zone. Marque stores the whole zone as one atproto record, so writes are atomic and this list is authoritative — omitted entries are removed.
